name: @mastra/pg
description: Postgres provider for Mastra - includes both vector and db storage capabilities

scripts.pretest: docker compose up -d && (for i in $(seq 1 30); do docker compose exec -T db pg_isready -U postgres && break || (sleep 1; [ $i -eq 30 ] && exit 1); done)
scripts.pretest:vnext: docker compose -f docker-compose.vnext.yaml up -d && (for i in $(seq 1 30); do docker compose -f docker-compose.vnext.yaml exec -T timescale pg_isready -U postgres && docker compose -f docker-compose.vnext.yaml exec -T partman pg_isready -U postgres && break || (sleep 1; [ $i -eq 30 ] && exit 1); done)
scripts.pretest:perf: docker compose -f docker-compose.perf.yaml up -d && (for i in $(seq 1 30); do docker compose -f docker-compose.perf.yaml exec -T db pg_isready -U postgres && break || (sleep 1; [ $i -eq 30 ] && exit 1); done)
scripts.pretest:pooler: docker compose -f docker-compose.pooler.yaml up -d && (for i in $(seq 1 30); do docker compose -f docker-compose.pooler.yaml exec -T db pg_isready -U postgres && break || (sleep 1; [ $i -eq 30 ] && exit 1); done) && (for i in $(seq 1 30); do nc -z localhost 6433 && break || (sleep 1; [ $i -eq 30 ] && exit 1); done)
scripts.prebench:init: docker compose -f docker-compose.benchmark.yaml up -d && (for i in $(seq 1 30); do docker compose -f docker-compose.benchmark.yaml exec -T db pg_isready -U postgres && break || (sleep 1; [ $i -eq 30 ] && exit 1); done) && (for i in $(seq 1 30); do nc -z localhost 8476 && break || (sleep 1; [ $i -eq 30 ] && exit 1); done)
